title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes using Claude Code (Anthropic's AI assistant) to build a product that generates $481k annually in 45 days with zero prior coding experience. He outlines five operational steps: ship fast around clear problems, distinguish high-value versus low-risk engineering work, learn domain vocabulary over syntax, plan before building, and audit for failure modes. The video includes seven concrete prompts for orchestrating Claude Code workflows such as codebase risk assessment, vocabulary tutoring, pre-deployment checklists, and payment flow testing.
